originalAlarm.description: a value is read without initialization.

sanitizedDescription: a value is read without initialization.
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_MODULE_UNLOAD () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_SMP () Bool
  true)
reasoning: PULSE_UNINITIALIZED_VALUE alarm at 6e2b75740be.c L63 in the MODULE_UNLOAD AND SMP path — reads freed mod pointer (use-after-free). This is the VBDB-known bug confirmed by // ERROR at L63. PC = CONFIG_MODULE_UNLOAD AND CONFIG_SMP correctly constrains to when both unload and SMP paths are active.
